name: Oriental Chrysanthemum Bowl
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice all meats and vegetables into thin strips.
2. Bring chicken stock, sesame oil, and salt to a boil in a large serving pot (a Mongolian Hot Pot is traditional).
3. Keep the broth bubbling over low heat.
4. Arrange noodles and raw ingredients attractively on a platter.
5. Add sherry and soy sauce to the boiling broth.
6. Provide guests with chopsticks and serving bowls.
7. Invite guests to add the raw ingredients to their individual pots of broth.
8. Cook until fish and shrimp are opaque.
9. Just before serving, sprinkle leaves from the chrysanthemums on top of the soup.
10. Ladle some of the soup into each guest's bowl.
